_publications._publicationTitle: SVA retrotransposon insertion-associated deletion represents a novel mutational mechanism underlying large genomic copy number changes with non-recurrent breakpoints.

_contextSnippet: direct and inverted repeats in the size range of ≥ 6 bp up to 150 bp, as identified by MEME Suite sequence analysis tools, were detected in 77% of the deletion breakpoint-flanking regions...no overrepresentation...was detectable
details: Detected direct and inverted repeats (≥6 bp up to 150 bp) in 77% of deletion breakpoint-flanking regions but no overrepresentation versus controls
